title: Earthy Fluffy Venezuelan Avocado Toast
description: A post-workout Venezuelan dish featuring steam-cooked sweet plantains, fluffy scrambled eggs, and mashed avocado on whole grain toast, perfect for a low-sodium diet. This recipe combines earthy flavors with a fluffy texture, making it a great option for a healthy snack or breakfast.
instructions: Steam the sweet plantains for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
Mash the ripe avocados in a bowl and set aside.
Scramble the eggs in a separate bowl and season with salt-free seasoning blend and black pepper.
Toast the whole grain bread for 2-3 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Spread the mashed avocado on the toasted bread.
Top the avocado with scrambled eggs, steam-cooked sweet plantains, and chopped fresh cilantro.
Drizzle the lime juice over the top.
